# cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_depth_format

**Function**

Sets the pixel format for the layer’s depth textures to the specified value.

## Declaration

```swift
void cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_depth_format(cp_layer_renderer_configuration_t configuration, MTLPixelFormat depth_format);
```

## Parameters

- **configuration**: The layer configuration details.
- **depth_format**: The pixel format to apply to your layer’s depth textures. The value you specify must be one of the values obtained from the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_depth_format] function.

## Discussion

Use this function to modify the configuration details for your layer. Fetch the layer’s supported pixel formats using the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_depth_format] function.

## Configuring the depth information

- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_get_depth_format**: Returns the pixel format to use for the layer’s depth textures.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_get_depth_usage**: Returns the texture usage value to apply to the layer’s depth textures.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_depth_usage**: Sets the texture usage for the layer’s depth textures to the specified value.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_get_default_depth_range**: Returns the distances for the far and near clipping planes you use during drawing.
- **cp_layer_renderer_configuration_set_default_depth_range**: Sets the default distances to the far and near clipping planes you use during drawing.
